title: MikroTik Cloud Router Switch CRS510-8XS-2XQ-IN
description: Optical Cloud Router Switch CRS510-8XS-2XQ-IN is a suitable 19" rackmount solution for 100 Gbps network distribution and as a small central optical switch that offers 8x SFP28 with a speed of 25 Gbps, 2x QSFP28 with a speed of 100 Gbps, 1x Ethernet port with support for power supply via PoE and console RJ45 port.The switch can be powered both via two redundant Hot-swap sources , a DC connector / DC terminal block (36 - 57V DC), and via an Ethernet port supporting PoE with a voltage of 43 - 57V… (2) 100G (QSFP28) + (8) 25G (SFP28) (1) 10/100 Mbps Ethernet - with PoE IN support (43 - 57V DC) (1) console RJ45 port Processor QCA9531, frequency 650 MHz, Mipsbe Memory 128 MB RAM Storage 32 MB RouterOS v7 Level 5 operating system Wide power options - 2x redundant power supply, PoE, DC connector, DC terminal block (1) Equipment (2) Power cord (1) Brackets for 19" rack
specsSearch: Connectors and Interfaces LAN speed (1) 10/100Mbps Optical interfaces (8) 25 Gbps + (2) 100 Gbps Serial port RJ45 Power Power over Ethernet 802.3bt, 43 .. 57V DC Power type PoE, DC connector, DC terminal, Mains power (230V) PoE type PoE-In (only) Redundant power supply Yes Max. power consumption [W] 45 Power via connector/terminal 36 .. 57V DC, 230V AC Physical characteristics Design Desktop, Rackmount "U" positions 1 Fans Yes Chassis design Metal Buttons Reset Operating temperature [°C] 40 up to 70 Width [mm] 320 Height [mm] 44 Depth [mm] 185 Hardware CPU QCA9531 CPU frequency [MHz] 650 CPU cores 1 Internal storage [MB] 32 RAM [MB] 128 General Jumbo frame [Bytes] 9000
